The Art of Charcoal

Est. 2020 · Johannesburg

4.9 ★★★★★
— Our Story —

Where Fire Meets
Flavour

At Fiestas Chicken, we believe in the primal power of fire. Every piece of chicken that leaves our kitchen has been carefully marinated, spiced with our secret peri-peri blend, and slow-grilled over authentic charcoal — the way nature intended.

Founded in the heart of Johannesburg in 2020, our mission is simple: bring people together over the unmistakable flavour of charcoal-grilled perfection. We source only the freshest, free-range chicken and pair it with bold South African flavours.

Our charcoal burns hot, our spices hit hard, and our standards never drop. From our family to yours — braai with passion.

50+
Menu Items
15k+
Happy Guests
4.9★
Rating
— Guest Reviews —

What Our Guests Say

"The best charcoal chicken in Joburg! The peri-peri wings are absolutely addictive. The flame-grilled flavour is unmatched. My whole family loves it!"

TK

Thabo K.

Regular Guest

"I've travelled all over SA and Fiestas has the best charcoal grills. The Ultimate Braai Box is incredible value. Uber Eats delivery is always hot and fresh!"

LM

Lindiwe M.

Verified Review

"Finally a place that takes charcoal grilling seriously. The Malva pudding is the perfect ending. Beautiful atmosphere, amazing food. 10/10!"

DN

David N.

Google Reviews
